rationale: Review 1 correctly identifies that three Prop-valued classes (AffineAlgGroup, ReductiveGroup, SemisimpleGroup) violate Mathlib's Is-prefix convention, confirmed by the file's own IsUnipotent usage; it also flags the field unipotent_radical_trivial : True as misleadingly named for a content-free stub. Acting on these would yield consistent, honest naming, while Review 2 approves the PR as-is and misses all of them.
